name: Pork with Lemon-Tarragon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Season pork with salt and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Sear pork on all sides until browned.
5. Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. In a saucepan, whisk together lemon juice, tarragon, garlic, and remaining olive oil.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve hot with roasted pork and sauce spooned over the meat.
